VariableID:5546:130264.name: icon/size/xsmall
VariableID:5546:130264.description: Eg. Badges (capsule), stepper number, local message

VariableID:5546:130263.name: icon/size/default
VariableID:5546:130263.description: Eg. buttons, seat icons, input field with icon (calendar)

VariableID:6428:137582.name: icon/size/large
VariableID:6428:137582.description: We keep this style (large) to keep the same structure with typography. There's no icon 26 in RefX

VariableID:6428:137583.name: icon/size/1xlarge
VariableID:6428:137583.description: We keep this style (1xlarge) to keep the same structure with typography. There's no icon 32 in RefX

VariableID:6428:137584.name: icon/size/2xlarge
VariableID:6428:137584.description: We keep this style (2xlarge) to keep the same structure with typography. There's no icon 36 in RefX

VariableID:5549:130280.name: corner-radius/00
VariableID:5549:130280.description: This is used for the inputs, footers, search recap and etc

VariableID:5675:73337.name: spacing/01
VariableID:5675:73337.description: Spacing between the elements/text inside the panels

VariableID:5549:130302.name: spacing/02
VariableID:5549:130302.description: Spacing between the interactive elements and the text; also icon (smaller than medium) and the content

VariableID:5549:130303.name: spacing/03
VariableID:5549:130303.description: Spacing between the separators and the content; also icon (bigger or equal than medium) and the content

VariableID:5549:130304.name: spacing/04
VariableID:5549:130304.description: Mostly on the edges of the panels and the sections

VariableID:5615:79443.name: spacing/05
VariableID:5615:79443.description: Mostly on the mobile view. Spacing between the page and the sections

VariableID:5549:130305.name: spacing/06
VariableID:5549:130305.description: Spacing between the title and the respective section

VariableID:5549:130306.name: spacing/07
VariableID:5549:130306.description: Spacing between the sections. Example between "Your flights, Passengers and contact" etc

VariableID:6097:29430.name: opacity/00
VariableID:6097:29430.description: Histogram no flights, secondary button and etc

VariableID:6097:29431.name: opacity/01
VariableID:6097:29431.description: All the borders and the separators

VariableID:6097:29433.name: opacity/03
VariableID:6097:29433.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76358.name: opacity/04
VariableID:6133:76358.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76359.name: opacity/05
VariableID:6133:76359.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76360.name: opacity/06
VariableID:6133:76360.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76361.name: opacity/07
VariableID:6133:76361.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76362.name: opacity/08
VariableID:6133:76362.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76363.name: opacity/09
VariableID:6133:76363.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:6133:76364.name: opacity/10
VariableID:6133:76364.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:5615:79447.name: border/width/01
VariableID:5615:79447.description: All the borders and the separators

VariableID:5715:77110.name: border/width/03
VariableID:5715:77110.description: Mainly on the message panel left side

VariableID:5613:76023.name: color/visual-focus (to delate?)/50
VariableID:5613:76023.description: Used only for focus border on the elements

VariableID:6323:90584.name: shadow/position/00
VariableID:6323:90584.description: It refers to X & Y position

VariableID:6323:90585.name: shadow/position/01
VariableID:6323:90585.description: It refers to X & Y position

VariableID:8363:37572.name: shadow/position/02
VariableID:8363:37572.description: It refers to X & Y position

VariableID:6428:137591.name: color/cabin-eco/50
VariableID:6428:137591.description: Mainly used for the cabin Economy

VariableID:6428:137615.name: color/cabin-other/50
VariableID:6428:137615.description: First cabin class color or any other new cabin class

VariableID:6488:125612.name: color/transparent-white/00
VariableID:6488:125612.description: This transparency is used in most cases eg. secondary button as a background (enabled, disabled)

VariableID:6880:1412.name: corner-radius/global/full-rounded
VariableID:6880:1412.description: This is mainly for 50% in dev to make it rounded

VariableID:7777:87744.name: typography/font-family/plain-family
VariableID:7777:87744.description: All the section titles, body texts and everything except the page title

VariableID:8197:74437.name: color/transparent-black/00
VariableID:8197:74437.description: This transparency is used in most cases eg. secondary button as a background (enabled, disabled)

VariableID:8661:99121.name: typography/line-height/01
VariableID:8661:99121.description: No line-height in font. Mainly on the page headings not section heading

VariableID:8661:99122.name: typography/line-height/02
VariableID:8661:99122.description: Line-height for caption and caption-link font. All the thin or light texts

VariableID:8661:99123.name: typography/line-height/03
VariableID:8661:99123.description: Line-height for all body (body-2, body-1, body-1-link) font. For all the body texts/paragraphs

VariableID:8661:99124.name: typography/line-height/04
VariableID:8661:99124.description: Line-height for display-1, button and input font.

VariableID:8687:103785.name: typography/line-height/06
VariableID:8687:103785.description: Line-height for subheading-2, display-3 and display-2 font.

VariableID:8687:103786.name: typography/line-height/07
VariableID:8687:103786.description: Line-height for title and display-4 font.

VariableID:5686:79077.name: panel/color/background/default-alt
VariableID:5686:79077.description: This color is used only for the expanded part of the panel.

VariableID:5686:79079.name: panel/color/foreground/description
VariableID:5686:79079.description: All the description values for both panel & expanded part

VariableID:5686:79080.name: panel/color/foreground/heading
VariableID:5686:79080.description: This color is used for: all the panel headings. In the Alert it will be used for icon, bullets as well

VariableID:5686:79081.name: panel/color/foreground/subheading
VariableID:5686:79081.description: All the sub headings of the panel. Example: itinerary details, your fare, etc in the itinerary card

VariableID:5715:77106.name: panel/color/border/default-alt
VariableID:5715:77106.description: border of the expanded part of the panel

VariableID:5918:23160.name: divider/color/default-alt
VariableID:5918:23160.description: Primary divider. Example in dialog with expand collapse
